command: Write-Output '=== CodeAnalyzer Directory Structure ==='; Get-ChildItem -Path 'C:\Users\Revexn\CodeAnalyzer' -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName, Length, LastWriteTime, @{N='Type';E={if($_.PSIsContainer){'DIR'}else{'FILE'}}} | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output '=== Python files content preview ==='; Get-ChildItem -Path 'C:\Users\Revexn\CodeAnalyzer' -Filter '*.py' -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "--- FILE: $($_.FullName) ---"; Get-Content $_.FullName -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 50; Write-Output '' }
description: استكشاف بنية مجلد CodeAnalyzer وقراءة أول 50 سطر من ملفات Python
